metadata.title:
GRAVES PEOPLE take


OVER BIG CHELAN co,

pages.raw_text:
Jay p. Graves and associates
have completed arrangements to
take over the stock and holdings of
the Chelan Transportation & Semlt-
ing Co. This means the opening up
Of the big Holden gold and copper
mine near Lake Chelan which has
been tied up by lack of transporta'
ton facilities, and the building of a
smelter on the shores OF the lake.
with steamer communication.


The agreement by which the in
terests Of the transportation and
smelling company are turned over
to the Graves people has been sign
ed and the stockholders of the com
pany will probably receive their
money about July.


Mining men who have investi.
gated the Holden mine pronounce 1t
one Of the bi.ges; and best PROPOSE.
